column1: Please FORWARD this to your TEAMS – INCLUDING THE NEW MEMBERS I MAY HAVE ADDED!!
Arrive at 10.30 – Check in at the ADMIN Table to get your name in the random draw
Games start at 11 – SHARP!!  If you don’t show up… you default your game
Lunch will be between 12.30-1.15 – if you do not have a game from 12.15 then start lunch early.
The draw will be done throughout the day.
